backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the G&S MEDICAL backend, defining data types (Medicine, SellerAccount, Customer, etc.) and implementing CRUD operations, user profile management, access control, and seller/customer registration with session token support.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the admin login shortcut link has been removed from public-facing navigation components, while the /admin route remains accessible by direct URL.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short descriptions summarizing each component's purpose, used as a reference for build planning.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the G&S MEDICAL React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, admin, seller, customer, seller detail) and wraps the app in ThemeProvider with a Toaster and a ChatWidget on public pages.
frontend/src/components/admin/MedicineMa: Admin CRUD interface for medicines, featuring a table of individual medicine rows with add/edit dialogs and delete confirmation, backed by React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/SellerMana: Admin CRUD interface for seller accounts with inline status-change dropdowns, edit dialog, and delete confirmation using React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/WebsiteCon: Admin editor for configurable site content fields (hero text, about, footer, etc.), each rendered as an independent component that fetches, edits, and saves its own value with character-limit tracking.
Reusable wrapper component that uses IntersectionObserver to trigger CSS entrance animations (fade-up, fade-in, slide-left, slide-right) on child content when scrolled into view, with reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: Floating chat widget with a toggle button and popup window that displays a bot/user message thread, quick-question shortcuts, and a text input, styled with a pink background and emerald header.
frontend/src/components/MedicineCard.tsx: Display card component for a single Medicine item showing its image, category badge, description, price, stock count, and availability status with hover animations.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll section links, and customer auth login/logout controls including a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Wraps admin routes to redirect unauthenticated users to /admin login page using the useAuth hook.
frontend/src/components/SellerCard.tsx: Displays a single seller's summary card (name, status badge, phone, address, license) that navigates to the seller detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/SellersSection.t: Landing page section that fetches and renders a grid of active SellerCards with loading skeletons and an empty-state fallback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an anonymous or authenticated actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Provides simple admin authentication using hardcoded credentials stored in localStorage, exposing login, logout, and isAuthenticated state.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerAuth.ts: Manages customer authentication state by persisting a token in localStorage, exposing login, logout, and isAuthenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing identity state, login/logout flows, and exposing status flags via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations (sellers, medicines, site content, customers), wrapping actor calls in typed useQuery and useMutation hooks with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSellerAuth.ts: Manages seller authentication state by persisting a token in localStorage, exposing login, logout, and isAuthenticated.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines the G&S Medical emerald-green and gold design token theme including custom utility classes and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with a sidebar navigation that renders overview stats, and tab-based views for managing medicines, sellers, and website content, with logout functionality.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Renders the admin login page with email/password form, handles authentication via useAuth hook, and redirects to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerLoginPage.tsx: Renders the customer login page, submits credentials via useCustomerLogin mutation, stores the token with useCustomerAuth, and redirects to the home page on success.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerSignUpPage.ts: Renders the customer registration form with validation, submits data via useRegisterCustomer mutation, and redirects to the customer login page with a success flag on completion.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the public-facing home page including a hero section, sellers section, stats, and contact info, fetching active sellers via useGetActiveSellers.
frontend/src/pages/SellerDashboard.tsx: Renders the authenticated seller's dashboard showing their profile details and approval status, with logout functionality and redirect to login if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/pages/SellerDetailPage.tsx: Displays a public seller profile page fetched by ID, showing contact info, status badge, license details, and WhatsApp/call links, with loading skeleton and not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/SellerLoginPage.tsx: Renders the seller login form with email/password fields, handles authentication via useSellerLogin hook, and redirects to the seller dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/SellerSignUpPage.tsx: Provides a seller registration form with validation for all required fields, submits via useRegisterSeller hook, and shows a success or error state after submission.
frontend/src/utils/chatbot.ts: Defines FAQ pattern-matching logic and store contact constants for a virtual chatbot assistant that returns predefined responses based on user message keywords.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Outfit, Playfair Display), OKLCH-based color tokens (emerald, gold, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 13) describing the G&S Medical store website, including architectural notes (admin credentials, contact info), known issues, and a detailed list of existing features covering the homepage, admin dashboard, seller management, AI assistant, authentication, and contact/WhatsApp integration.
